title: Steel Update
description:
Steel is similar to Iron, its a bit better but not as good as Diamond. so its very useful for medium stage of your game.

You can craft Steel using one Iron Ingot and one Coal.
body:
**Steel is similar to iron, it's a bit better but not as good as diamond. so its very useful for medium stage of your game**

- You can craft steel using one iron ingot and one coal

- You can also smelt iron in blast furnace to get steel

This mod adds Steel Tools, Steel Blocks, Steel Doors and Trapdoors

![Steel Stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a514e5bcb98cd28c00b77131208c70835d638f30.png)

[Download for 1.19.2 Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/steel-update/versions)
